default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review progress, clarify capacity, and align on Q4 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Integration Hub is a Success:** The hub drives 32k+ weekly visits (all external traffic), validating the content-as-enablement strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Q4 Focus: Technical Adoption:** The strategy shifts from high-level guides to deep technical content (code samples, templates) to drive adoption of Webflow's cloud products.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Capacity Model Clarified:** GrowthX's model is a project lifecycle: one program consumes heavy engineering resources during build-out, then transitions to maintenance, freeing capacity for the next.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Unified Engagement Proposed:** Colin will discuss unifying the GrowthX engagement (currently split between DevRel and Marketplace teams) with Rachel to improve efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Topics

### Q3 Performance & Strategy Validation

  - [**Integration Hub Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [Drives 32k+ weekly visits—a new record, exceeding even the university program's peak.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [All traffic is external, proving the content's value and reach.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [Analytics (page depth, session time) show high engagement, not just bounces.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [The content is enablement, not a direct conversion driver.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
      - [It functions as "effective frequency"—a series of helpful touchpoints that build developer confidence in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Anecdotal feedback confirms the content is being used and valued.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Future Measurement:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [Colin will connect Amplitude data to Segment to track ROI by linking content engagement to developer actions (e.g., API use).](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

### GrowthX Capacity & Project Lifecycle

  - [**Operating Model:** GrowthX manages projects in a lifecycle: build → mature → maintain.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Integration Pages:** Mature. Consumes 70–80% of Sydney's time for maintenance.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Use Case Guides:** In build phase. Consumes most engineering resources.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
      - [**Code Components:** Paused. Awaiting engineering capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**Resource Transition:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [The Integration Pages project will transition to low maintenance (\~20% of Sydney's time) in \~1.5 months.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [This frees engineering resources for the Code Components project.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [**Expansion:** GrowthX has capacity to scale; Colin will request a quote for additional scope.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### Q4 Strategy: Technical Adoption

  - [**Strategic Shift:** The focus moves from high-level guides to deep technical content.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Goal:** Drive adoption of Webflow's cloud products.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [**Content Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
      - [**Development Guides:** More technical than current use case guides, with code samples.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [**Code Components:** Deep-dive content to help developers solve problems.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [**Cloud Product Samples:** Evergreen examples for new features.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Golden Data Set:** A potential project to create 20+ "golden rule" templates.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [**Unified Engagement:** Colin will discuss consolidating the GrowthX relationship with Rachel to improve efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
      - [Request specific Amplitude metrics from Colin.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [Share new Use Case Guides with Vic for async review.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
      - [Prepare a quote for additional scope (e.g., SEO, Reddit).](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [**Colin:**](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
      - [Provide requested Amplitude data to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [Discuss unifying the GrowthX engagement with Rachel.](https://fathom.video/share/SdKBxgAJjhvy_RcJcBez-8zd9SKwezme?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

Email Colin Amplitude metrics ask; then Colin sets up regular readout
Align w/ Andy & Liz on effort-based predictability model; report back
Email Vic links to recent use-case guides for review
